import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import CLIPModel

class CLIPClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, model_name='openai/clip-vit-base-patch16', num_classes=62, unfreeze_last_n=0):
        super().__init__()
        self.clip = CLIPModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
        self.vision = self.clip.vision_model
        # Freeze all by default
        self.vision.requires_grad_(False)
        self.unfreeze_layers(unfreeze_last_n)
        hidden_size = self.vision.config.hidden_size  # 768
        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_size)
        self.classifier = nn.Linear(hidden_size, num_classes)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(0.1)

    def unfreeze_layers(self, last_n):
        if last_n <= 0:
            return
        layers = self.vision.encoder.layers
        total_layers = len(layers)
        for i in range(max(0, total_layers - last_n), total_layers):
            for p in layers[i].parameters():
                p.requires_grad = True
        # Also unfreeze the final layer norm after transformer blocks if desired
        for p in self.vision.encoder.layernorm_final.parameters():
            p.requires_grad = True

    def forward(self, pixel_values):
        outputs = self.vision(pixel_values=pixel_values, output_hidden_states=False)
        pooled = outputs.pooler_output
        pooled = self.norm(pooled)
        pooled = self.dropout(pooled)
        logits = self.classifier(pooled)
        return logits
